title: HyperV regression tests fail due to privileges
body:
### Issue Description

HyperV CI tests are failing to run properly because they apparently do not have correct permissions.  These errors can be seen in https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5759477765373952?logs=main#L289  ... I didn't include this in #20842 because while this is likely why the tests fail, it is not the reason the CI still passes.
